---
title: "TRSE units: BBCM"

# BBCM

These paths are relative to `units/BBCM/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `demotools`
- `files`
- `gfx/gfx`
- `gfx/text`
- `player`
- `screen`
